'''Roger Stern''' was the owner of [[Stern Traders]], as well as being a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] sympathizer. He was meant to meet with a group of rebels on [[Greyman's Planet]] but was unfortunately captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] when they discovered his rebel ties. He was held captive in the Imperial garrison outside of the [[City/Legends|city]] containing [[Da'Harrin Spaceport]] while his associate, [[Ral Yekkiv]], attempted to free him.
